subcodes.first_line: That which hath emanated from thine inmost heart and the wellsprings of thy conscience hath become manifest and understood, and the sighs and lamentations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه از هویت قلب و منابع وجدان نبعان نموده بود معلوم و مفهوم شد و انین و حنین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @poems and quotation from poetry
